phrases.intent_en: Where is the Anthropos Pavilion entrance?
phrases.text_local: Kde je vstup do pavilonu Anthropos?
phrases.cultural_note: The Anthropos Pavilion is not part of the main Dietrichstein Palace building, so staff will direct you outside.

likely_response.local: Je to samostatná budova, asi deset minut pěšky.
likely_response.translation_en: It's a separate building, about a ten-minute walk.

responses.english: It's a separate building, about a ten-minute walk.
responses.local: Je to samostatná budova, asi deset minut pěšky.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I rent the audio guide?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically rented at a dedicated desk near the ticket area.

likely_response.local: U přepážky vlevo od hlavního vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: At the counter to the left of the main entrance.

responses.english: At the counter to the left of the main entrance.
responses.local: U přepážky vlevo od hlavního vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay by card at the entrance?
phrases.cultural_note: Card payment is widely accepted at major museums in Brno, but it's always good to confirm.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we take cards and cash.

responses.english: Yes, we take cards and cash.

phrases.intent_en: Is the combined ticket still available?
phrases.text_local: Je ještě k dispozici kombinovaná vstupenka?
phrases.cultural_note: A combined ticket is a standard offer for visitors wanting to see multiple museum sites.

likely_response.local: Ano, platí do všech našich budov.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it's valid for all our buildings.

responses.english: Yes, it's valid for all our buildings.
responses.local: Ano, platí do všech našich budov.
